channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16396] sanityn: test_33c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel triggered
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo.
This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0f22bd98-6127-4792-8ac6-30c892dd7844

== sanityn test 33c: Cancel cross-MDT lock should trigger Sync-Lock-Cancel ========================================================== 04:29:55 (1670992195)
CMD: onyx-65vm5 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds1 (opts:) on onyx-65vm5
CMD: onyx-65vm5 umount -d /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: onyx-65vm5 ! zpool list -H lustre-mdt1 >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
			grep -q ^lustre-mdt1/ /proc/mounts ||
			zpool export  lustre-mdt1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lsmod | grep zfs >&/dev/null || modprobe zfs;
			zpool list -H lustre-mdt1 >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
			zpool import -f -o cachefile=none -o failmode=panic -d /dev/lvm-Role_MDS lustre-mdt1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 zfs get -H -o value 						lustre:svname lustre-mdt1/mdt1
Starting mds1: -o localrecov  lustre-mdt1/mdt1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov  lustre-mdt1/mdt1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
CMD: onyx-65vm5 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
onyx-65vm5: onyx-65vm5.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: onyx-65vm5 zfs get -H -o value 				lustre:svname lustre-mdt1/mdt1 2>/dev/null | 				grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
pdsh@onyx-111vm1: onyx-65vm5: ssh exited with exit code 1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 zfs get -H -o value lustre:svname 		                           lustre-mdt1/mdt1 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-MDT0000
CMD: onyx-65vm5,onyx-65vm6 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.*MDT*.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-52vm3 lctl set_param -n osd*.*OS*.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lctl set_param -n mdt.*.sync_count=0
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.sync_count
sync_count 2
CMD: onyx-65vm5,onyx-65vm6 lctl set_param -n os[cd]*.*MDT*.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-52vm3 lctl set_param -n osd*.*OS*.force_sync=1
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lctl set_param -n mdt.*.sync_count=0
CMD: onyx-65vm5 lctl get_param -n mdt.*MDT0000.sync_count
sync_count 1
 sanityn test_33c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel triggered

2 more hits:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/92ac91c3-159a-4389-9cda-66476d3376af
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/81692d46-23ee-4bbe-967a-57e5337a0593

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
